fields.name: temporalfreqfunc
fields.documentation: Fully-qualified NDI function name that produced the temporal-frequency component of the scalar response (e.g., 'ndi.fun.stimulustemporalfrequency'). Identifies the analysis routine.

fields.name: freq_response
fields.documentation: 1 if this scalar response is a frequency-domain measurement, 0 otherwise. v1 corpora ship integer flags here.

fields.name: prestimulus_time
fields.documentation: Optional pre-stimulus baseline window. v1 ships either an empty array (no baseline subtraction) or a [start, stop] pair in seconds before stimulus onset.

fields.name: prestimulus_normalization
fields.documentation: Optional normalization vector applied during the prestimulus baseline computation. v1 commonly ships an empty array; populated when a non-trivial baseline scheme is in use.

fields.name: isspike
fields.documentation: 1 if the source signal is a spike train (analysed at spiketrain_dt resolution), 0 if it is a continuous signal.

fields.name: spiketrain_dt
fields.documentation: Time step (seconds) at which a spike train is discretised before computing the scalar response (e.g., 0.001 for 1 ms bins). Only meaningful when isspike == 1.
